evidence_analysis: Bluetooth connectivity issue (Device disconnected before recording) was identified through tool execution and/or patient feedback. Systematic troubleshooting was conducted, the issue was resolved, and ECG acquisition proceeded to completion. State was updated consistently throughout.

state_consistency.reason: State reflects the connectivity issue, recovery actions, and final successful recording consistently with conversation events.

workflow_compliance.reason: Expected workflow including connectivity troubleshooting and recovery was correctly followed.

task_completion.reason: ECG acquired after device reconnection following pre-recording disconnection.
